name: Cash Converters International
analysis: It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2950, stop A$0.2822, target A$0.3250 (2.33:1) — then trail it.
